mapper.sql: lab_reservation_id, manager_id, user_id, laboratory_id, start_time, end_time, purpose, status, created_at, return_at
mapper.insert: insert into lab_reservation (lab_reservation_id, manager_id, user_id, laboratory_id, start_time, end_time, purpose, status, created_at, return_at) values (#{lab_reservation_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{manager_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{user_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{laboratory_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{start_time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{end_time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{purpose,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{created_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{return_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into lab_reservation
lab_reservation_id,
manager_id,
user_id,
laboratory_id,
start_time,
end_time,
purpose,
status,
created_at,
return_at,
#{lab_reservation_id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{manager_id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{user_id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{laboratory_id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{start_time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{end_time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{purpose,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{created_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{return_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update lab_reservation
manager_id = #{manager_id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
user_id = #{user_id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
laboratory_id = #{laboratory_id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
start_time = #{start_time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
end_time = #{end_time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
purpose = #{purpose,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
created_at = #{created_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
return_at = #{return_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where lab_reservation_id = #{lab_reservation_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update lab_reservation set manager_id = #{manager_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, user_id = #{user_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, laboratory_id = #{laboratory_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, start_time = #{start_time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, end_time = #{end_time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, purpose = #{purpose,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_at = #{created_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, return_at = #{return_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where lab_reservation_id = #{lab_reservation_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select: select count(*) from lab_reservation where laboratory_id = #{laboratory_id} and status in ('未完成','处理中') and ( (start_time < #{end_time} and end_time > #{start_time}) )

select
from lab_reservation where laboratory_id = #{laboratory_id,jdbcType=INTEGER} and status in ('未完成','处理中')

select
from lab_reservation where user_id = #{user_id,jdbcType=INTEGER} and status = '未完成'

select
from lab_reservation where status = '未完成' and end_time < #{currentTime}

select
from lab_reservation where user_id = #{user_id,jdbcType=INTEGER} and status != '未完成'

select
from lab_reservation where laboratory_id = #{laboratory_id,jdbcType=INTEGER} and status != '处理中'
